title: RPC Request
description: JSON-RPC 2.0 request used inside rpc:request PayloadFrame messages. api_version and meta are recommended for Plug profile v2.1+ callers, but remain optional at runtime for backward compatibility with implicit v2.0 requests.

id.description: Request identifier. Omit or set to null only for notifications when negotiated compatibility allows it.

api_version.description: Recommended contract version marker for Plug profile v2.1+. Requests without api_version are accepted as compatibility mode.

meta.description: Optional protocol metadata. Only the published fields below are part of the contract.
